channel.title: Anish J — Thoughts
channel.description: Notes on product, reliability, and learning by Anish J.

item.title: What an MBA Teaches an Engineer
item.description: Early reflections from the PGPM at Great Lakes — finance, strategy, and the surprisingly hard skill of communicating simply.

item.title: Reliability Is a Product Feature
item.description: Uptime, latency, and graceful failure aren't just engineering concerns — they shape how customers experience and trust a product.

item.title: From On-Call to Roadmap
item.description: What moving from site reliability into product management taught me about empathy, prioritization, and saying no to the right things.
